---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One line describing the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

Why does this matter? What problem does it solve, and how does it fit current
priorities?

## Proposed Outcome

What should exist when this is done? Describe the behavior, not the
implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Observable, testable outcome 1
- [ ] Observable, testable outcome 2

## Scope

In scope:

- 

Out of scope (non-goals):

- 

## Relevant Files / References

- Repository, files, docs, or links.

## Open Questions

- Decisions that need Lystiger before work starts.
